name: Auto Review on Code Change
description: When code files are edited, trigger the CI Review Agent to validate against coding standards and auto-fix issues

then.prompt:
A code file was just edited. As the CI Review Agent:

1. Check the changed file against the coding standards in the steering docs
2. Identify any violations (formatting, style, missing type hints, YAML issues, SQL anti-patterns)
3. If issues are auto-fixable, fix them directly
4. If issues need human judgment, report them clearly
5. For Python: check type hints, docstrings, import order, no print(), no bare except
6. For YAML: check indentation, quoted booleans, document separator, trailing whitespace
7. For SQL: check uppercase keywords, explicit columns, partition pruning, JOIN aliases

Be concise in your report. Only mention actual issues found.
